query:
INSERT INTO event_orders (
  orderNumber, customerName, customerEmail, customerPhone, companyName,
  eventType, eventDate, eventTime, venue, guestCount,
  subtotal, gstAmount, discountAmount, totalAmount,
  advancePercentage, advanceAmount, advancePaid, advancePaidAt,
  balanceAmount, balancePaid, balancePaidAt,
  status, adminNotes, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'EVT-LEELA-HYD-001',
  'The Leela Palace Hyderabad',
  'events@theleela.com',
  '0000000000',
  'The Leela Palace',
  'corporate',
  '2026-03-05',
  '18:00',
  'The Leela Palace, Road No 2, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500034',
  50,
  16417500,
  2955150,
  0,
  19372650,
  100,
  19372650,
  true,
  NOW(),
  0,
  true,
  NOW(),
  'completed',
  'Invoice raised on 11-Mar-2026. Taiwan Maami Popup and Master Class at The Leela Palace Hyderabad (5-6 March 2026). Payment: 100% against invoice via bank transfer. Invoice total: Rs. 1,93,726.50 (incl. 18% GST).',
  '2026-03-11 00:00:00',
  NOW()
);
